metadata.tagline: Happiness is important for healthy living
metadata.purpose: Detailed visual dashboard with FULL scripts and guidance

approaches.script: Hey, random question — do you ever have those stretches where you just feel kind of blah, like your mood is stuck in neutral? I work with a product called Joy by Super Patch that helps people naturally lift their mood and emotional well-being, completely drug-free. What do you usually do to boost your mood when you're feeling off?

I've been thinking about you — you mentioned feeling kind of down lately and I wanted to share something that's really helped me. It's called Joy from Super Patch and it's a drug-free patch that supports mood and emotional balance. Would you be open to trying something natural like that?

Hey! I saw your post and it sounds like things have been heavy lately — just wanted to reach out. I've been using Joy by Super Patch and it's genuinely helped me feel more like myself, more positive and balanced, without any medications. Have you ever explored natural options for mood support?

Hi! [Mutual friend] suggested I reach out to you — they thought you might be interested in something that's helped a lot of people with their emotional well-being. I work with Joy from Super Patch, a drug-free patch designed to enhance mood and bring back that positive outlook. Would you be open to a quick chat about it?

So how's life treating you lately — honestly? I ask because so many people I meet are going through the motions but not really feeling great. I work with Joy by Super Patch, a drug-free patch that helps people feel happier and more emotionally balanced. What does your ideal day look like when you're in a really good headspace?

2b_rapport_story.title: 🫂 BUILD RAPPORT
2b_rapport_story.description: Share your personal story to build trust
2b_rapport_story.personal_story: Hey [Name], there was this stretch where I just felt flat. Not sad exactly, but nothing excited me. Going through the motions every day. A friend gave me this Joy patch and within a day or two, [Name], I just felt lighter. More like myself. Started laughing at stuff again, enjoying the little things. It's weird how you don't realize how off you were until something shifts.
talking_points: Use their name — signal this is personal, not a pitch
Make it relatable — most people have been in a funk
Share the subtle shift — laughing more, small joys returning
Don't pitch — the realization of feeling 'off' is the connection
2b_rapport_story.transition_to_discovery: [Name], that's why I mention it. How are you doing — honestly? Sometimes we don't realize how off we've been until someone asks.

questions.question: How would you describe your overall mood and emotional energy on a typical day?
When was the last time you felt genuinely happy and like yourself — how long ago was that?
Do you notice your mood shifting throughout the day, or does it feel more like a constant heaviness that's hard to shake?
How much does stress from work or life tend to drag your mood down, even when things are going okay?
Have you found yourself pulling back from social plans or activities you used to enjoy?
How does your mood affect your relationships — do the people around you notice when you're not yourself?
If you could wake up every day feeling positive and emotionally balanced, what's the first thing that would change in your life?
What have you tried to lift your mood — exercise, supplements, therapy, or anything else — and how has that worked?
How do you feel about prescription options for mood support versus something natural and drug-free?
If there was a simple, drug-free way to support your emotional well-being every day, would that be something you'd want to explore?

content.problem: You used to feel like yourself — upbeat, engaged, excited about life — but lately there's this emotional heaviness that you just can't shake. Your mood swings without warning, the things that used to bring you joy barely register, and you find yourself just going through the motions. It's not that anything is dramatically wrong, but something is definitely off.
content.agitate: When your mood is low, it touches everything — you start withdrawing from friends and activities, your relationships feel the strain, and slowly you lose touch with the version of yourself you actually like. You might try supplements or consider medications, but the side effects and uncertainty make it feel like trading one problem for another. Over time, that emotional weight becomes the new normal, and that's the scariest part. {{discovery_callback}}
content.solve: That's why Joy exists. It uses Vibrotactile Technology — VTT — to support your body's natural mood regulation by working with your own neural pathways. No drugs, no side effects, no dependency — just a gentle, drug-free signal that helps your body find its way back to emotional balance and a brighter outlook.

objections.response: I hear you. But think about what you're already spending — therapy sessions, supplements, maybe even prescriptions for mood support. Joy costs a fraction of a single therapy visit and works every day, completely drug-free with no side effects. What matters most to you beyond price when it comes to feeling like yourself again?
objections.psychology: Shift focus to cumulative cost of therapy, supplements, and prescriptions vs Joy's daily drug-free value

objections.response: Of course, no rush. Is it the idea of a drug-free mood patch that feels new, or is something else holding you back? A lot of people are used to the idea that mood support has to come from a pill or a therapist. What questions can I answer to help you feel comfortable?
objections.psychology: Identify whether hesitation is about the unconventional approach to mood support

objections.response: That makes sense — and honestly, your mood affects everyone around you. A lot of families notice the difference when someone starts using Joy. What concerns do you think your spouse might have? I'd love to help you explain the drug-free, no-side-effects approach.
objections.psychology: Surface objections early and highlight that improved mood benefits the whole family

objections.response: I completely understand — mood is deeply personal, and you want something real, not a gimmick. Joy uses Vibrotactile Technology, which works with your body's natural neural pathways to support emotional well-being — no chemicals, no side effects, no dependency. What would you need to experience to believe a drug-free patch could actually help your mood?
objections.psychology: Let them define proof while positioning VTT as a legitimate, side-effect-free alternative to mood medications

objections.response: I hear that a lot — supplements that didn't deliver, medications with side effects that felt worse than the problem, or therapies that took forever to work. What let you down about those? Joy is fundamentally different because VTT technology doesn't put any chemicals in your body — it supports your mood through your nervous system, with zero side effects.
objections.psychology: Learn what failed and contrast Joy's side-effect-free VTT approach against mood meds and underwhelming supplements

objections.response: Totally fine. Just curious — are you feeling like yourself these days? A lot of people don't realize they've been running on low until someone points it out. If you ever want a drug-free way to support your mood without the side effects of medications, Joy is worth knowing about.
objections.psychology: Uncover whether they've normalized feeling low and plant a seed about drug-free mood support

objections.response: I get it — life is hectic. But here's the thing: Joy takes seconds to put on. No therapy appointments to schedule, no pills to time with meals, no journaling routines. And imagine how much better your busy days would go if you were in a genuinely good headspace. How would a better mood change the way you handle your day?
objections.psychology: Reframe time concern into the mental energy lost when mood is low every day

objections.response: Great that you're looking into options — what appeals to you about that one? Here's what makes Joy different: most mood support comes with trade-offs — antidepressants have side effects, supplements are hit or miss, therapy takes weeks to see results. Joy uses Vibrotactile Technology, meaning zero chemicals enter your body. It works with your nervous system to support emotional balance naturally. How important is avoiding side effects and dependency to you?
objections.psychology: Highlight VTT's side-effect-free, dependency-free advantage over mood medications and supplements

6_closing.title: 🏆 5 CLOSING TECHNIQUES
6_closing.pre_close: Always ask: 'Do you have any questions?' + 'Does this make sense?'

techniques.name: ASSUMPTIVE
techniques.script: Sounds like you're ready to start feeling like yourself again — let's get Joy headed your way. What's the best shipping address?
techniques.when: They've expressed wanting to feel happier or get back to their old self emotionally

techniques.name: ALTERNATIVE
techniques.script: Would you like the 30-day supply to see what brighter days feel like, or the 90-day pack so you can stay in that positive headspace and save while you're at it?
techniques.when: They're interested but deciding on commitment level — connect each option to sustained emotional well-being

techniques.name: URGENCY
techniques.script: We've got a promotion ending this week — and honestly, every day you spend in that fog is another day you're missing out on the things and people that matter to you. Want to lock this in and start feeling the difference?
techniques.when: They've acknowledged feeling down or withdrawn but are hesitating — remind them of the social connections and joy they're missing right now

techniques.name: SUMMARY
techniques.script: So let me make sure I've got this — you want to feel like yourself again, have brighter days instead of just going through the motions, and reconnect with the people and activities you've been pulling away from. Joy supports all of that, completely drug-free. Ready to get started?
techniques.when: Long conversation about mood struggles — recap their specific emotional pain points and tie Joy to the positive outlook and social reconnection they described wanting

techniques.name: REFERRAL
techniques.script: Now that you're on your way to brighter days — who else in your life could use a lift? A friend who's been down, a coworker who seems off, a family member going through a rough patch? They'd probably love to feel like themselves again too.
techniques.when: After a successful close — mood struggles are relatable, so their renewed positivity naturally leads to thinking about friends or family who also seem down

7_followup.title: 📅 FOLLOW-UP SEQUENCE
7_followup.goal: Build relationship → Get testimonials → Generate referrals

sequence.template: Hey {{FirstName}}! Just confirming your samples are on the way. You should receive them in about 2 days. I'll check back in when they arrive!
Hey {{FirstName}}! Your samples should be arriving today or tomorrow. Have they shown up yet? Let me know when they do — don't open them without me!
Before we open it, I want you to understand. This isn't about hype. It's about experience. I want you to pay attention to what you notice, not what you expect.

Hey {{FirstName}}, checking in! What did you notice today?
What felt different?
When did you feel it most?
What surprised you?
How is your mood? Noticing any improvements in how you feel day to day? Are things feeling a little brighter?
Hope you're loving the results! Ready to keep the momentum going? Who else do you know that could use a mood boost?
Based on everything you've experienced — are you ready to make this part of your routine? Let's get you set up.
